focus: Identify the smallest mode-complete authored typed-gold slice among loader-eligible routing scenarios.
noveltyJustification: 4 of 5 findings were fully new and 1 partially new (0.90), plus a 0.10 simplicity bonus for reducing the open slice question to six exact scenario IDs and one explicit alignment corpus gap.
keyQuestions: Which exact scenario IDs form the smallest mode-complete first typed-gold slice among the eligible routing candidates?
answeredQuestions: No seven-mode-complete eligible slice exists; MR-001, MR-002, MR-003, IL-001, IL-002, and IL-003 are the exact six-mode maximal seed, with alignment missing.
ruledOut: AI-002 as one typed row covering three independently scored modes

label: MR-001, MR-002, MR-003, IL-001, IL-002, and IL-003 are the exact six-mode maximal authored seed.
